commands.author: clawsweeper[bot]
commands.repair_reason: No narrow automation repair is evident; maintainers should decide the avatar-fetch policy and whether current screenshot proof plus validation is enough to merge.; Cleared: No concrete exploitable defect was found in the diff, but the new constrained remote avatar fetching remains a maintainer security-boundary decision. (sha=6cd00106792b3db5cfd50688786a0305c50c6f9b)
commands.review_summary:
The PR adds refreshed dynamic OG image rendering for skills, plugins, souls, and publisher profiles, plus metadata helpers, extensionless route wrappers, a watermark asset, constrained avatar fetching, and tests.

Reproducibility: not applicable. this is a feature/visual refresh rather than a reported bug. Review verification is high-confidence from the PR diff, linked 1200 x 630 PNG proof images, and the stated targeted/CI validation.
commands.review_followup: No narrow automation repair is evident; maintainers should decide the avatar-fetch policy and whether current screenshot proof plus validation is enough to merge.

target.title: feat: refresh dynamic OG images
target.body:
## Summary

Refreshes ClawHub dynamic OG images for skills, plugins/packages, and publisher profiles with the final dark gradient layout from the maintainer-requested design iteration.

- Adds a shared registry OG SVG renderer for skills/plugins with install command text, stats, audit state, local ClawHub watermark asset, and constrained avatar loading.
- Adds plugin and publisher/profile OG routes, plus extensionless route wrappers for social image URLs.
- Updates skill, plugin, and publisher metadata to point at dynamic OG endpoints on canonical routes.
- Keeps legacy `/p/<handle>` redirecting to canonical `/user/<handle>`.
- Hardens public OG avatar fetching to trusted HTTPS image hosts, no redirects, bounded body reads, and timeout-through-body consumption.

## Screenshots

These screenshots use real public ClawHub users and packages captured from production for visual validation. Stress-test entries are also real production records, selected because their names, descriptions, or audit states exercise harder layout cases.

| Surface | Baseline | Stress test |
| --- | --- | --- |
| Skill | ![Self-Improving Agent OG](https://rapid-ether-za64.here.now/skill.png) | ![Medication Side Effect Visit Log OG](https://rapid-ether-za64.here.now/skillLong.png) |
| Package/plugin | ![Spotify package OG](https://rapid-ether-za64.here.now/package.png) | ![AI Inner OS package OG](https://rapid-ether-za64.here.now/packageLong.png) |
| Publisher | ![byungkyu publisher OG](https://rapid-ether-za64.here.now/publisher.png) | ![Financial AI Analyst publisher OG](https://rapid-ether-za64.here.now/publisherLong.png) |

## Mock Data Stress Test On Local Assets

These are earlier OG lab stress-test fixtures kept only to illustrate layout behavior with controlled local/mock data. The names, handles, descriptions, stats, avatars, and organization logos in this section are not intended to represent production records.

| Surface | Baseline | Stress test |
| --- | --- | --- |
| Skill | ![Mock skill OG](https://sonic-steeple-5mne.here.now/skill.png) | ![Mock skill long OG](https://sonic-steeple-5mne.here.now/skillLong.png) |
| Package/plugin | ![Mock plugin OG](https://sonic-steeple-5mne.here.now/plugin.png) | ![Mock plugin long OG](https://sonic-steeple-5mne.here.now/pluginLong.png) |
| Publisher user | ![Mock publisher user OG](https://sonic-steeple-5mne.here.now/publisherUser.png) | ![Mock publisher long user OG](https://sonic-steeple-5mne.here.now/publisherLongUser.png) |
| Publisher org | ![Mock publisher org OG](https://sonic-steeple-5mne.here.now/publisherOrg.png) | ![Mock publisher long org OG](https://sonic-steeple-5mne.here.now/publisherLongOrg.png) |

## Validation

- `bun run test -- server/og/fetchImageDataUrl.test.ts server/routes/og/plugin.png.test.ts server/routes/og/skill.png.test.ts server/routes/og/soul.png.test.ts server/og/skillOgSvg.test.ts src/lib/og.test.ts src/__tests__/users-route-redirect.test.ts src/__tests__/skill-route-loader.test.ts`
- `bun run ci:static`
- `bun run ci:unit`
- `bun run ci:types-build`
- Local built-server smoke: `/og/skill`, `/og/skill.png`, `/og/plugin`, and `/og/profile` returned `200 image/png` with PNG signatures.
target.author: vyctorbrzezowski
